summary: Teng-i, a powerful level 202 Marionette Bear, dominates the pet colosseum after revealing his 'Fallen' attribute, which he acquired by secretly holding onto a unique item from a dungeon. Following these victories, Mr. Kang receives an invitation to meet the influential CEO Bill Knight, confirming Kang's status as a top-tier player. Determined to achieve his goals, Kang decides to debut as a pro gamer and form his own passionate, highly skilled team to eventually challenge Jeong Hanbaek.
key_moments: Teng-i's status window is revealed, showing he has reached level 202 and gained the 'Fallen' attribute.
Teng-i dominates the pet colosseum, winning 20 matches in a row as other pets forfeit.
Mr. Kang is contacted by Kayle to arrange a meeting with CEO Bill Knight.
Mr. Kang announces his decision to become a pro gamer and form his own team to target his rival, Jeong Hanbaek.
